questions.question: Describe the importance of project planning in software development. How does it impact the overall success of a project? (10 marks)
Explain the role of quality management in software development. What steps can be taken to ensure that software meets the required standards? (8 marks)

Compare and contrast the approaches to project planning and quality management in agile and traditional software development methodologies. How do these approaches impact the development process? (12 marks)
